questions.subject: Soil Mechanics
questions.stem: A saturated soil deposit ($\gamma_{sat}=20\,\text{kN/m}^3$) is $6\,\text{m}$ thick with water table at the surface. At a depth of $2\,\text{m}$, the effective vertical stress is _____ kPa.

questions.subject: Soil Mechanics
questions.stem: A soil has coefficient of permeability $k = 0.001\,\text{m/s}$ and is subjected to a hydraulic gradient $i = 0.5$. The Darcy (discharge) velocity is _____ m/s.

questions.subject: Soil Mechanics
questions.stem: A soil has coefficient of permeability $k = 0.0002\,\text{m/s}$ and is subjected to a hydraulic gradient $i = 0.8$. The Darcy (discharge) velocity is _____ m/s.

questions.subject: Soil Mechanics
questions.stem: A soil has liquid limit $45\%$ and plastic limit $22\%$. Its plasticity index is _____ %.

questions.subject: Soil Mechanics
questions.stem: A soil has liquid limit $55\%$ and plastic limit $25\%$. Its plasticity index is _____ %.

questions.subject: Soil Mechanics
questions.stem: The coefficient of consolidation $c_v$ has the same dimensions as
questions.solution:
**Concept.** $c_v$ has units of area/time (e.g. m²/yr).

**Working.**
$L^2T^{-1}$.

**Answer.** length²/time

questions.subject: Soil Mechanics
questions.stem: The maximum dry density of a soil is obtained at
questions.solution:
**Concept.** MDD occurs at OMC in a compaction test.

**Working.**
OMC.

**Answer.** Optimum moisture content
